.file-embed.background: rgb(47, 56, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(47, 56, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(47, 56, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(47, 56, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(47, 56, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(39, 47, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(82, 92, 98) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(47, 56, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(82, 92, 98) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(47, 56, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(47, 56, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(47, 56, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(47, 56, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(86, 157, 121) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(86, 157, 121) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(47, 56, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(64, 77, 68) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(39, 47, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(39, 47, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
